CustomField.description: Urgency level of the transport for this opportunity. Evaluated by the supplement engine against conditional surcharge rules — Express or Urgent values may trigger additional surcharges as defined in the active Supplement configuration records.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the transport urgency level for this opportunity. "Express" or "Urgent" may automatically trigger additional surcharges. Defaults to "Standard" if no urgency applies.
CustomField.label: Transport Urgency
